name: Blog · Reestruturar Draft
description: Webhook: recebe {draft_id, title, lead, body, pillar} e re-estrutura via Anthropic em content_json completo (sections, blocks, faqs, slug, meta).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-5", max_tokens: 16000, system: $json.system, messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.user }, { role: "assistant", content: "{" }] }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE blog_drafts SET slug=$1, title=$2, meta_description=$3, keywords=$4::text[], content_json=$5::jsonb, word_count=$6, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=$7 RETURNING id, slug, title, pillar;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, draft_id: $json.id, slug: $json.slug, title: $json.title }) }}
